title: Archive of Sparks: Chapter 0 - Trapped People
opening_text: Everyone is busy. But few people know why they are busy.

identity.label: Delivery Worker / Platform Worker
identity.scene_title: A shift governed by the platform

scene_steps: The platform sends a new order.
The route is calculated by an algorithm.
The worker feels that every minute is being measured.
core_question: Why are contemporary workers managed by algorithms and platforms?

route_choices.label: Political Economy Route
route_choices.explanation: This route studies algorithmic management as part of the labor process: platforms organize work, measure time, allocate tasks, and shift risk onto workers.

route_choices.label: Mainstream Economics Route
route_choices.explanation: This route examines platforms as market coordinators that match supply and demand, set incentives, reduce transaction costs, and optimize service capacity.

route_choices.label: Technology Route
route_choices.explanation: This route focuses on ranking, routing, dispatch, timers, metrics, and feedback systems that make platform control appear automatic and neutral.

route_choices.label: State and Institutions Route
route_choices.explanation: This route asks how labor law, regulation, contracts, courts, and public institutions shape what platforms can require from workers.

related_archives.title: Algorithms / platform algorithms
related_archives.description: Study routing, ranking, optimization, dispatch, and the technical systems behind platform control.

related_archives.title: Marxism / political economy
related_archives.description: Study labor, capital, surplus, control, and how platforms reorganize the labor process.

related_archives.title: Mainstream economics placeholder
related_archives.description: A future route for markets, incentives, matching, transaction costs, and platform business models.

related_archives.title: State and institutions placeholder
related_archives.description: A future route for labor law, contracts, regulation, courts, public policy, and institutional power.

atang_context.base_context: Archive of Sparks Chapter 0 - Trapped People. Playable identity: Delivery Worker / Platform Worker. Opening: Everyone is busy. But few people know why they are busy.
atang_context.role: Atang helps the player connect the scene to history, economics, technology, institutions, and knowledge routes.
atang_context.tone: Clear, lively, concise, and useful for a learner inside the story.
atang_context.safety: Do not give unsafe real-world confrontation instructions. Encourage lawful, thoughtful, knowledge-based understanding.
